canonical_statement: local ledger is the canonical authority for accepted MemoryCards; RAGFlow is a searchable mirror plus vector retrieval, never source of truth.
recall reaches RAGFlow over an MCP-direct read path (G3 read-SoT); Mac ledger read for transcript-chunk recall is cut.
supersede/conflict detection uses embedding-cosine candidate recall plus an LLM judge, failing closed to needs_review on ambiguity; lexical-only and threshold-only are rejected.
autopilot auto-accept runs through the human_approval primitive at cold start, not the auto_policy path which is blocked at zero accepted-evidence.

demotion sets currentness=superseded plus superseded_by; lifecycle_state has no superseded value, so demoted cards keep their accepted lifecycle but leave current and accepted lanes via a currentness filter.
brain.query excludes cards whose currentness is superseded or conflicted from the accepted lane.
the golden answer-key is a throwaway dev/eval harness for bootstrapping and grading the autopilot loop, with zero runtime coupling to the shipped product.
derived memory consolidates into the single derived-memory-items dataset; legacy curated datasets are contract roles without active separate writes.
trusted curation and judgment are owned by neurons and do not use RAGFlow Agent or its workflows; RAGFlow provides search only (vector plus optional reranker).

unattended curation cycles are driven by an external scheduler on the Ubuntu brain-server host (systemd timer or cron; a container timer once containerized) since the execution host is Ubuntu and the Mac is a thin client; an on-demand MCP tool covers in-session triggers because MCP cannot self-schedule.
the finish gate requires SILENT-LIE rate and false_current count at hard zero over three consecutive final-slice cohorts, plus per-lane F1 and demote/conflict thresholds.
operational A-guards are dropped for autonomy, B-core trust invariants are kept because they are the product, and C redaction stays on to avoid irreversible secret leaks.
the accept path refuses candidates flagged conflict, missing-source, or high-severity-drift via classify_candidate_block_reason before any canonical write.
the autopilot cycle is mine, classify, accept or supersede, project, recall, grade against the held-out golden, then tune policy or fire the tripwire.
the golden dogfood target is the neurons project, drafted by the assistant and corrected by the user, sized large with a 70/30 tuning/final split.
the session-information ingest and GC pipeline is at completion stage and is out of scope for the autopilot recall work.
RAGFlow Agent and its workflow features drive memory curation.
the product needs the full set of about thirteen RAGFlow datasets for derived memory.
the golden answer-key is a permanent product fixture maintained over time.
a pure MCP-trigger lets an MCP server schedule its own unattended autopilot cycles.
the local ledger alone can provide the Context7-style semantic recall UX.
session-memory is the universal top authority for current truth across all source types.
RAGFlow itself is the source of truth that knows everything about the machine.
the concrete embedding similarity cutoff for the supersede detector is not yet calibrated.
open_blocker_key: needs calibration against the tuning slice

canonical_statement: the live transcript-memory LLM mining provider that produces candidates from RAGFlow is not yet integrated; the cli currently reads candidates from a JSON file.
the launchd timer that drives unattended autopilot cycles is not yet installed.
machine_origin tagging that excludes autopilot approvals from readiness signals is deferred and not yet implemented.
the llm_brain_candidates persistence table for deterministic re-grading is deferred; the cycle currently runs candidates in memory.
the golden-free runtime tripwire that replaces golden grading after graduation is designed but not implemented.
the golden answer-key content is a partial draft that must be user-corrected and expanded to the target per-lane counts.
whether to use RAGFlow Agent for non-trusted archive-lane synthesis (Stage-2 drill-down) is an open option to revisit later.
